title: HOMCOM 2 In 1 Plush Baby Ride on Rocking Horse Elephant Rocker with Wheels Wooden Toy for Kids 32 Songs for 18+ Months (Blue)
features: 2-In-1 Design: Featuring smooth rocking runners and 4 foldable rolling wheels, make it not only a rocking horse but also can be used as a stroller. Buy single product and get two functions.
Classic Toy with Nursery Rhyme: Combines elephant shape with updated features such as 32 nursery rhymes will be played when the ear are pressed.(2 AA batteries included).
Soft Plush Body: A soft plush body and easy-grip front handlebar included recreate the look and feel of thrilling horseback riding adventures. Suitable for kid age 18 months and up.
Safe and Gentle Rocking: Smooth rocking runners with safety belt ensures safety, let your child feel like they are actually riding without the danger of actual riding.
Lightweight and Long-Lasting: Features a solid and stable metal frame that weighs only 3.6kg while still supporting up to 60kg of weight. Overall Dimension: 60L x 35W x 45H cm.
description: Product Description HOMCOM is here to make your house a home - and do it in style too. Bringing you classic designs and innovative styles with the everyday in mind, our online shop is everything your living space has been calling out for. For those who enjoy keeping fit, you can do it in the comfort of your home with our selection of cardio and strength training. And for the kids? We've got that covered too: here you'll find cute furniture, rocking toys and even the super cool electric ride-ons. Ride to the stars on a cute horse! Our traditional rocking toy with elephant modeling will turn your home into a magical wonderland where anything is possible! Features 4 rolling wheels and wooden rails, making it not only a rocking horse but also can be used as a stroller. Buy one product and get 2 functions. Squeeze the ear to hear 32 nursery rhymes, this kid toy is fun and educational. The body covered with soft fabric and comfortable wide seat is perfect for a magical adventure. 2-in-1 rocking animals with wheels to stroll, rocking horse and stroller all-in-one Hand-crafted with a wooden core and handles for balance, and quickly to be converted into a strolling animal by flipping the wheels off the wooden rocker Soft and Plush materials make the rocker comfortable to ride on for hours Safety belt and high back hold your baby steady when rocking Squeeze the ear for 32 nursery songs Material: Plush, Steel, Wood Overall Dimensions: 60L x 35W x 45H (cm) Net Weight: 3.3kg Colour: Blue Weight Capacity: 60kg Suitable Age: 18 months + Battery With 3 LR44 battery Custom Label: 330-067BU Balance Ability Fully develops your children’s cerebellum and improves their balance ability while playing happily. Rich in Color A variety of colors can well arouse your children’s interests, helpful for them staying and playing longer. Safety Made of 100% safe materiel with smooth surface, takes good care of your baby's health. Gives both of you and your kids a reassuring experience. Warm and cosy The soft material provides extra comfortable experience for your kids. 330-110 330-006 330-137 330-007 330-115 330-154V00GY Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 345 4.7 out of 5 stars 1,225 4.5 out of 5 stars 89 4.7 out of 5 stars 1,225 4.5 out of 5 stars 164 4.8 out of 5 stars 54 Price £47.87 £ 47 . 87 £42.49 £ 42 . 49 £36.37 £ 36 . 37 £36.54 £ 36 . 54 — no data £40.84 £ 40 . 84 Character Donkey Giraffe Koala Elephant Lion Elephant Product Dimension 61L x 34W x 58Hcm 60L x 33W x 45Hcm 60L x 33W x 50Hcm 60L x 33W x 45Hcm 68 L x 35 W x 50Hcm 60 L x 33 W x 45Hcm Recommended Age 18-36 months 18-36 months 18-36 months 18-36 months 18-36 months 18-36 months Suitable Ages 18-36 months 18 months+ 18-36 months 18 months+ 18-36 months 18-36 months Weight Capacity 40kg 60kg 45kg 60kg 40kg 50kg Color Grey Yellow Grey Blue Brown Grey Sound Y Y Y Y Y Y
